description: Create a GeoServer SLD style named 'river_buffer' that dynamically renders a 0.1-degree buffer around line features using a red fill (#FF0000) with 0.5 opacity in a polygon symbolizer. Assign this style to the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer in the 'ne' workspace. Admin interface: http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (User: admin, Password: Admin123!).
